s1.speaker: gary
s1.line: One more thing. Ever seen this seal?

s2.speaker: narrator
s2.line: The loupe comes up. Total stillness — a heron's stillness, the kind that precedes a strike. Then, softly:

s4.speaker: gary
s4.line: A witness saw it on an envelope in the capsule. I drew it.

s5.speaker: prudence
s5.line: Then your witness saw Edmund Vale's personal signet. The lantern in ivy. Not the council seal — the family's. That ring never left the family, Mr. Gibbons. It sits, as far as I know, on his son's finger to this day.
